creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please ask around on the ports@ mailinglist or the questions@ 
mailinglist. This is not a Problem Report but some questions that you 
have. They can give pointers on which sounddriver you need to load (we 
need more information from your system before we can do that), and 
things like that. The Gnats DB is not the proper medium for that. Thanks 
for using FreeBSD and taking the time to report this though, we 
appreciate it that you are willing to make FreeBSD better.
